data.title: UniSat announces the launch of a new version of its extended wallet, which will support the detection of phishing websites
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News UniSat announced on the X platform that its extended wallet v1.5.8 is now online. The new version of the wallet will support phishing website detection, and you will receive an immediate alert when visiting a reported or blacklisted website. In addition, it also fixes the problem of not being able to prompt the UniSat signature due to conflicts with other extensions.

data.title: Bedrock (BR) listed on Binance Alpha
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the Binance page, Binance Alpha has launched Bedrock (BR).

data.title: Uniswap Community Approves Proposals to Boost Network Growth and Revenue Sharing
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the Uniswap community has approved two significant governance proposals aimed at advancing the Unichain network and the Uniswap V4 protocol. These initiatives, collectively known as "Uniswap Unleashed," introduce a new grants program and liquidity incentives, while also hinting at preliminary steps for a "fee switch." This fee switch, a long-debated protocol vote, would allocate a portion of trading fees to holders of Uniswap's UNI tokens.

The governance posts did not explicitly mention the fee switch but outlined plans to "activate revenue." The Uniswap Foundation has requested $95.4 million for its grants budget and $25.1 million for operational costs over two years, along with $45 million for liquidity incentives. These funds are intended to attract users and stimulate ecosystem growth through developer campaigns. Governance data indicates that both proposals received over 80% approval from UNI token holders.

The approval of these proposals could initiate the fee switch, a longstanding community objective that aims to redirect some protocol revenue—currently exceeding $1 billion annually—from liquidity providers to UNI holders. The activation of this switch, previously delayed by unsuccessful votes, depends on legal preparations by the foundation. Initially proposed in July 2021, the switch was intended to pilot for a select group of Uniswap protocol pools. It will not increase fees for users but will retain a small portion of what is currently paid out to liquidity providers, or users who lock up their tokens on Uniswap in exchange for fee rewards.

While this could result in reduced fee earnings for Uniswap's liquidity providers, it promises increased rewards for holders of Uniswap's native token, UNI, thereby enhancing its value for UNI holders. The proposal has lingered for several years, with one such vote failing to pass in 2023 due to opposition from influential token holders. As part of the steps toward revenue sharing, the Uniswap Foundation—a non-profit organization dedicated to developing and maintaining Uniswap—plans to establish itself as a legal entity. This move would provide clarity on its legal status and enable it to contract with other protocols.

The proposal stated, "If our vetting is successful and we believe the creation of a legal entity for Uniswap Governance is in its best interest, we would propose to Governance to implement a legal entity structure." It further noted, "If adopted, this step would pave the way for the potential introduction (or re-introduction) of a governance proposal for delegators to earn Protocol revenue."

data.title: Arthur Hayes: The US Bank Credit Supply Index is on an upward trend, which is a good sign for BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes posted on the X platform that the U.S. bank credit supply index is on an upward trend (the indicator is customized by him), which is a good sign for BTC. Although it does not mean that the current market downtrend has ended, the possibility of a market turnaround is becoming more optimistic.

data.title: Bedrock Token TGE Event Ends, Receives 194,800 BNB Subscriptions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bedrock’s token generation event (TGE) in cooperation with PancakeSwap through Binance Wallet has ended, and about 194,800 BNB (US$122 million) have been subscribed. The project plans to raise 2018.53 BNB, which is oversubscribed by more than 9553%. According to the official announcement, Bedrock will sell 50 million BR tokens, accounting for 5% of the total supply, with each token priced at US$0.025 (in BNB), and the total amount raised is US$1.25 million (in BNB).

data.title: Michael Saylor Highlights Bitcoin's Importance for the Euro
data.description: According to PANews, Michael Saylor recently expressed on Twitter that the Euro (EUR) will require Bitcoin (BTC).

data.title: Upbit: No fees will be charged in the process of supporting digital asset transactions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Upbit issued a statement saying that some media reported that it charged brokerage fees in the process of supporting digital asset transactions, so it clarified that Upbit does not charge any fees to ensure transaction support, but determines whether to provide transaction support based on the transaction support policy provided on the official website, including: accepting transaction support applications, preliminary/brief review, formal evaluation, transaction support review committee resolution, and providing transaction support. All procedures are directly performed by Upbit employees. 
Upbit also asked some media that mentioned that they needed to pay brokerage fees to provide evidence and materials for the list of related projects in order to actively cooperate with fact-checking and investigation.

data.title: Uranium Digital Completes $6.1 Million Seed Round Led by Framework Ventures
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Uranium Digital announced the completion of a $6.1 million seed round of financing, led by Framework Ventures. This financing will accelerate Uranium Digital's establishment of a uranium spot trading platform using crypto infrastructure as the backend, and promote the development of the "financialized" uranium spot market. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Analyst: Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs show divergent capital flows
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BRN analyst Valentin Fournier analyzed that the inflow rate of Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs has slowed down, but this is not necessarily bad news, because overall trading activities are still active, but the inflow of funds for the two assets shows a divergent trend. For example, the inflow of funds into the Bitcoin ETF the day before was US$11.8 million, while the outflow of funds from the Ethereum ETF was US$11.7 million. Although the inflow of funds has temporarily decreased, the continued high trading volume indicates that market participation continues, rather than weakening interest. (Decrypt)

data.title: Kraken announces $1.5 billion acquisition of NinjaTrader
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Kraken announced the acquisition of US futures trading platform NinjaTrader for $1.5 billion. It can now provide digital asset futures and derivatives services in the United States because NinjaTrader has obtained CFTC registration. In addition, Kraken's regulatory licenses in the UK, EU and Australia will help NinjaTrader expand in these regions.
